caption: A man with blond hair and glasses, wearing a light gray sweatshirt and large white over-ear headphones, speaks directly to the camera in an indoor setting. He is positioned in front of a gray textured wall featuring a framed blue and white picture with the number "20" visible. To his left stands a decorated Christmas tree with glowing green, blue, and red lights. A black microphone is positioned directly in front of him. Throughout the sequence, the man’s facial expressions shift as he talks, moving from an open-mouthed smile to a more neutral, speaking expression. A constant white and colored text banner at the bottom of the screen reads, "INSTANTMADDENCOINS.COM - CODE MARS FOR 10% OFF!" with the word "MARS" appearing in a colorful gradient. The background and equipment remain static while only the man's mouth and facial muscles move as he speaks.
